description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines base templates using the registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-build-images:gitlab-charts-build-base image for .review-base and the same registry image with a docker:19.03.0-dind service for .review-docker, setting DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375. In the review-prepare stage, the review-build-cng job runs `BUILD_TRIGGER_TOKEN=$REVIEW_APPS_BUILD_TRIGGER_TOKEN ./scripts/trigger-build cng`; the review-deploy job (stage review) runs `check_kube_domain`, `ensure_namespace`, `install_tiller`, `install_external_dns`, `download_chart`, `deploy || (display_deployment_debug && exit 1)`, and `add_license`, always saving `review_app_url.txt` as an artifact and deploying to the dynamic review environment URL. In the prepare stage, build-qa-image builds a QA Docker image with `time docker build --cache-from gitlab/gitlab-${GITLAB_EDITION}-qa:nightly --tag ${QA_IMAGE} --file ./qa/Dockerfile ./`, logs in via `echo "${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" | docker login --username gitlab-ci-token --password-stdin ${CI_REGISTRY}`, and pushes it with `time docker push ${QA_IMAGE}`; a scheduled counterpart schedule:review-build-cng repeats the same trigger on scheduled pipelines. In the qa stage, review-qa-all (parallel:5) runs `gitlab-qa Test::Instance::Any "${QA_IMAGE}" "${CI_ENVIRONMENT_URL}" -- --format RspecJunitFormatter --out tmp/rspec-${CI_JOB_ID}.xml --format html --out tmp/rspec.htm --color --format documentation`, review-qa-smoke runs `gitlab-qa Test::Instance::Smoke "${QA_IMAGE}" "${CI_ENVIRONMENT_URL}"`, review-performance downloads a custom exporter and runs `docker run --shm-size=1g --rm -v "$(pwd)":/sitespeed.io sitespeedio/sitespeed.io:6.3.1 --plugins.add ./gitlab-exporter --outputFolder sitespeed-results "${CI_ENVIRONMENT_URL}"` producing a performance.json artifact, and parallel-spec-reports installs build tools with `apk add --update build-base libxml2-dev libxslt-dev && rm -rf /var/cache/apk/*`, installs nokogiri, and merges HTML reports via `scripts/merge-html-reports`. In the test stage, danger-review (only when $DANGER_GITLAB_API_TOKEN is present) runs `git version`, `node --version`, `yarn install --frozen-lockfile --cache-folder .yarn-cache --prefer-offline`, and `danger --fail-on-errors=true`; review-cleanup-failed-deployment runs `delete_failed_release`; review-stop stops the review environment with `delete_release` and is triggered manually, while schedule:review-cleanup runs a Ruby cleanup script on a review schedule and schedule:review-performance runs the performance job on a schedule, all respecting appropriate only/except rules and environment variables.
